patch.comment: Patch release after version normalization to major 3.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

patch.comment: Dummy patch release to republish after npm token incident.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

major.comment: Release a new major version with greenfield drag-and-drop internals, improved event/state flow, and breaking API adjustments for interaction primitives.
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

major.comment: Major release: zero-dependency drag-and-drop primitives for file drop zones (createDropZone) and sortable lists (createSortable); file type filtering via accept[], dropEffect control, hover state tracking, and onDropRejected callback; sortable reordering via data-sort-id attributes with drag handle support, onReorder callback, and dynamic list refresh; AbortSignal-free cleanup via destroy() and [Symbol.dispose](); framework-agnostic and SSR-safe
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>
